calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brandon Tang of Mandarich Law Group telephone number 510-896-9411 for Palintiff CACH.
Defendant Lori Luddington telephone number 510-209-3636 in Propria Persona.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Lori Luddington's Claim of Exemption is granted. Ms. Luddington has provided sufficient evidence to show that all of her earnings are exempt. Order to be prepared by the Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
